lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane artifact-only reconcile; scenarios drive guard-verification + evidence-fidelity proof.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: artifact-lint.sh re-runs captured in report.md: red at FAILED/43 issues pre-mutation (status done invalid: DoD contains unchecked items), green at PASSED post-mutation.

scenarios.title: scopes.md DoD goes from 26 unchecked to 0 unchecked and both scopes restored to Done
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: grep -cE '^- \[ \] ' specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern/scopes.md returns 0; both Scope 1 and Scope 2 carry **Status:** Done; artifact-lint DoD completion gate passes.

scenarios.title: Parent state.json gains top-level certifiedAt + bubbles.spec-review CURRENT entry
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: jq -r '.certifiedAt' parent state.json returns 2026-06-06T17:30:00Z; a bubbles.spec-review executionHistory entry with reviewStatus=CURRENT and runCompletedAt<=certifiedAt is present; post-cert-spec-edit-guard committed-history check (git log --since=certifiedAt) is clean.

scenarios.title: Parent artifact-lint goes from FAILED to PASSED
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: artifact-lint.sh specs/042-tailnet-edge-bind-pattern exits 0 (PASSED): DoD completion gate green, ### Validation Evidence + ### Audit Evidence headings present, historical report.md evidence wrapped in sanctioned evidence-legitimacy-skip markers, no narrative summary phrases.

scenarios.title: Persistent compose-contract regression cover stays GREEN by construction
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: go test -count=1 -v ./internal/deploy/ -run 'Compose' returns ok with 0 failures; the fail-loud HOST_BIND_ADDRESS contract + infra-no-ports + network_mode-host adversarial coverage stays GREEN by construction since BUG-042-001 changes zero runtime behaviour.

scenarios.title: Every re-ticked DoD item is backed by real shipped+tested evidence (no force-tick)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: Each of the 26 parent DoD items carries an inline Evidence reference to a real command/file; the single item whose whole-repo gate is red (./smackerel.sh test unit --go full suite) is disclosed as a non-042 caveat (internal/assistant + tests/unit/clients) rather than force-ticked.
